generated_oml:
instance SafetyViolationInsight : dt:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of temperature safety violation in thermal incubator system"
]

instance OptimalityInsight : dt:Insight [
    base:desc "Assessment of system operation optimality for thermal control"
]

instance TemperaturePredictionInsight : dt:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted temperature values from simulation models"
]

instance ParameterCalibrationInsight : dt:Insight [
    base:desc "Calibrated model parameters based on sensor data"
]

instance DataTransmissionInsight : dt:Insight [
    base:desc "Successful transmission of sensor data to Digital Twin"
]

instance CodeVersionInsight : dt:Insight [
    base:desc "Current version of Digital Twin codebase"
]

instance AdjustHeatbedPowerAction : dt:Action [
    base:desc "Adjust heatbed power based on bang-bang control parameters (LL, UL, H, C)",
    dt:IsAutomatic true
]

instance AdjustFanSpeedAction : dt:Action [
    base:desc "Adjust fan speed for air circulation based on temperature control requirements",
    dt:IsAutomatic true
]

instance DataTransmissionService : dt:Service [
    base:desc "Service for transmitting sensor data via RabbitMQ to Digital Twin",
    dt:provides DataTransmissionInsight
]

instance SimulationService : dt:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation models (Model A and B) for temperature prediction",
    dt:provides TemperaturePredictionInsight
]

instance CalibrationService : dt:Service [
    base:desc "Calibration algorithms using non-linear least squares optimization to update model parameters",
    dt:provides ParameterCalibrationInsight
]

instance MonitoringService : dt:Service [
    base:desc "Monitoring services to assess safety and optimality of system operation and control heatbed/fan via bang-bang control",
    dt:provides SafetyViolationInsight, OptimalityInsight, AdjustHeatbedPowerAction, AdjustFanSpeedAction
]

instance VersionControlService : dt:Service [
    base:desc "Manages version control for Digital Twin codebase",
    dt:provides CodeVersionInsight
]

instance RabbitMQMessageBroker : dt:Enabler [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker serving as communication channel for sensor data transmission to Digital Twin",
    dt:enables DataTransmissionService
]

instance ScipyOptimizationEnabler : dt:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python Scipy non-linear least squares solver for model parameter calibration",
    dt:enables CalibrationService
]

instance SimulationEnabler : dt:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python simulation environment for thermal model execution",
    dt:enables SimulationService
]

instance GitHubRepository : dt:Enabler [
    base:desc "GitHub repository for open-source implementation of the Digital Twin",
    dt:enables VersionControlService
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmission : dt:DataTransmitted [
    dt:producedFrom DS18S20Sensor1, DS18S20Sensor2, DS18S20Sensor3
]

instance DS18S20Sensor1 : dt:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer sensor measuring temperatures from -55°C to +125°C with ±0.5°C accuracy between -10°C to +85°C",
    dt:producedData TemperatureDataTransmission
]

instance DS18S20Sensor2 : dt:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer sensor measuring temperatures from -55°C to +125°C with ±0.5°C accuracy between -10°C to +85°C",
    dt:producedData TemperatureDataTransmission
]

instance DS18S20Sensor3 : dt:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer sensor measuring temperatures from -55°C to +125°C with ±0.5°C accuracy between -10°C to +85°C",
    dt:producedData TemperatureDataTransmission
]

instance HeatbedActuator : dt:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Heatbed controlled via MOSFETs and optocouplers handling ~4A current, actuated through Raspberry Pi GPIO"
]

instance AirCirculationFanActuator : dt:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "12V/24V fan for air circulation actuated through Raspberry Pi GPIO"
]

instance RaspberryPi4ModelB : dt:Component [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B controller used for system control and data processing"
]

instance CustomPCB : dt:Component [
    base:desc "Custom PCB with MOSFETs and optocouplers for handling ~4A current for heatbed and fan control"
]

instance ModelA : dt:Model [
    base:desc "Two-parameter dynamic thermal model calibrated using non-linear least squares optimization",
    dt:inputTo ScipyOptimizationEnabler, SimulationEnabler
]

instance ModelB : dt:Model [
    base:desc "Four-parameter dynamic thermal model calibrated using non-linear least squares optimization",
    dt:inputTo ScipyOptimizationEnabler, SimulationEnabler
]

instance TemperatureData : dt:Data [
    base:desc "Temperature measurements from DS18S20 sensors used for model validation and parameter estimation",
    dt:fromData TemperatureDataTransmission,
    dt:inputTo ScipyOptimizationEnabler, SimulationEnabler
]

instance ThermalIncubatorSystem : dt:Environment [
    base:desc "Thermal incubator system consisting of styrofoam insulated container (0.03 m³ air volume), heatbed, fan, temperature sensors, Raspberry Pi controller, custom PCB, and power supply",
    base:contains HeatbedActuator, AirCirculationFanActuator, DS18S20Sensor1, DS18S20Sensor2, DS18S20Sensor3, RaspberryPi4ModelB, CustomPCB
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Commands to control the heatbed and fan are sent from the controller via RabbitMQ to the low-level driver, which executes actuation commands on the hardware components."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrated components include RabbitMQ communication server, low-level driver, controller, and simulation models; data flows from physical sensors to RabbitMQ, processed by the controller for decision-making and actuation."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin operates in the 'as operated' phase, integrating models post-deployment for real-time monitoring and control of the physical system."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model B validated as superior for predicting thermal inertia; assumptions tested via experiments (e.g., temperature uniformity), with residual error minimized through optimization to ensure model accuracy."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ (AMQP protocol) running on Raspberry Pi for inter-component communication between physical sensors and Digital Twin services."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "All Digital Twin components (RabbitMQ server, controller, low-level driver) hosted on Raspberry Pi 4 Model B."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Low-level driver incorporates a safe protocol to maintain device safety; specific cybersecurity measures not detailed in the document."
]
